title: 蝶々反乱
description:
Launch butterfly horns to reclaim nature in this score-attack action game! In "Butterfly Rebellion," your goal is to raise your Greening Rate as high as possible within a 180-second time limit.

[Overview]

Fire your horns at humans and others to take back nature and raise your Greening Rate! How much of the map can you reclaim within 180 seconds?

[Leaderboards]

Reclaim as much nature as you can to push your Greening Rate higher. Finish in the top 10 to appear on the leaderboard. Aim for the top!

[Strategy]

Just fixing things when enemies show up isn't enough. When do you grab items? How early in each wave do you start fighting? The way you play decides your score.

[Born from a Game Jam]

"Butterfly Rebellion" was created at Sapporo Game Camp 2025 - planned, developed, and presented in just two days - and has now evolved and returned after repeated polish based on great feedback from exhibitions.

Controller support included.
description_short: Butterfly Rebellion Launch butterfly horns to reclaim nature and raise your Greening Rate! Restore as much territory as possible within 180 seconds while fighting back against environmental destruction.
